tasks.check: deno check main.ts && deno task build:ui
tasks.desktop: deno task build:ui && deno desktop --backend webview --allow-read --allow-write --allow-run=/usr/bin/osascript --include dist main.ts
tasks.build:macos:arm64: deno task build:ui && deno desktop --backend webview --target aarch64-apple-darwin --output artifacts/macos-arm64/JuRename.app --icon ../assets/icon.icns --allow-read --allow-write --allow-run=/usr/bin/osascript --include dist main.ts
tasks.build:macos:x64: deno task build:ui && deno desktop --backend webview --target x86_64-apple-darwin --output artifacts/macos-x64/JuRename.app --icon ../assets/icon.icns --allow-read --allow-write --allow-run=/usr/bin/osascript --include dist main.ts
tasks.build:windows:x64: deno task build:ui && deno desktop --backend webview --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc --output artifacts/windows-x64/JuRename.msi --allow-read --allow-write --allow-run=powershell.exe --include dist main.ts
